prompt: A photorealistic architectural exterior rendering of a large modern luxury family house viewed straight on from the front gate, perfectly centered and symmetrical. The house is a two-story contemporary mansion with smooth off-white stone or stucco walls, dark charcoal roof trim, large black-framed windows, and a grand recessed entrance with tall dark double doors under a flat canopy. On the left side, an open garage clearly reveals 1 white luxury SUV parked inside. On the right side, a floor-to-ceiling glass living room window shows 1 black grand piano inside, with elegant interior lighting faintly visible. In the foreground, 2 tall gray stone gate pillars frame the entrance, each topped with 1 classic black lantern for a total of 2 lanterns, and the right pillar has a gold nameplate engraved with Japanese text 藤 咲. A wide light-gray tiled walkway leads from the gate to the front door, bordered by neatly manicured green lawn and abundant white rose flowerbeds on both sides. Add trimmed shrubs, slender cypress-like trees near the doorway, low hedges, and rooftop terrace greenery. Surround the property with lush leafy trees at the edges of the frame. Use bright midday summer sunlight, crisp shadows, a vivid deep blue sky with a few small white clouds, ultra-clean materials, high-end residential design, realistic reflections in the glass, and a polished aspirational real-estate advertisement look.
